subject: Astronomy & Space
title: The Hubble Space Telescope
description: One-minute skill: The Hubble Space Telescope.

hook.text: Hubble orbits above Earth's atmosphere, seeing the universe with ten times the clarity of ground-based telescopes.

buildup.text: Launched in 1990, it immediately had a problem—a flawed mirror produced blurry images. It was a public embarrassment.

discovery.text: Astronauts installed corrective optics in 1993. The fix worked, and Hubble became the most productive telescope in history.

twist.text: Hubble's Deep Field images revealed thousands of galaxies in a patch of sky that appeared empty to the naked eye.

climax.text: Over 30 years of operation, Hubble has produced iconic images and over 20,000 scientific papers.

punchline.text: A blurry start, then brilliance. Thirty years of cosmic discovery.

quiz.question: What problem did Hubble have immediately after its 1990 launch?
options: A flawed mirror produced blurry images until astronauts installed corrective optics
Its solar panels failed and it lost all power
It was placed in the wrong orbit and couldn't observe anything
